summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No security-sensitive hydrated item was reported. None has the complete merge preflight required for merge_candidate, and no concrete repair artifact is warranted from the hydrated evidence, so each PR is kept as an independent maintainer-review item.

actions.reason: Independent OpenAI embedding behavior PR. Keep for maintainer review; do not merge from this plan because mergeable state is unknown and the required merge_preflight is incomplete.
Standalone fix PR for the post-run lane-delay issue. Keep for maintainer review; no closeout or merge action is allowed without merge preflight and post-merge close is disabled.
Small config/schema PR with useful focused scope. Keep for maintainer review; do not emit a repair artifact because the hydrated evidence does not identify a concrete branch repair.
Small defensive transport-error PR. Keep for maintainer review; no concrete fix artifact is justified from the hydrated evidence.
Broader but coherent diagnostics PR. Keep for maintainer review; do not merge from this plan because required merge_preflight is missing.
